hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -Eq 'git[[:space:]]+commit'; then b=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ "$b" = "main" ] || [ "$b" = "master" ]; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Workflow rule: never author commits directly on %s. Create a feature branch first (git switch -c <branch>), commit there, push it, then merge into %s."}}\n' "$b" "$b"; fi; fi
